---
title: "Bengio Responds to Saba on Symbolic AI"
description: "Yoshua Bengio's response to Walid Saba's \"AI Cannot Ignore Symbolic Logic, and Here's Why.\""
author: "synesis"
date: "2022-01-02"
categories: [AI, deep learning, links]
image: cover.jpg
---

![Bengio responds to Saba. Image from [Medium](https://medium.com/ontologik/ai-cannot-ignore-symbolic-logic-and-heres-why-1f896713525b).](cover.jpg){fig-align="center"}

Yoshua Bengio's response to Walid Saba's blog "AI Cannot Ignore Symbolic Logic, and Here's Why" (<https://medium.com/ontologik/ai-cannot-ignore-symbolic-logic-and-heres-why-1f896713525b>). Highlights are mine.

(Response taken from <https://www.facebook.com/yoshua.bengio/posts/4220503864721188>)


*Originally posted on [LinkedIn](https://www.linkedin.com/posts/benjaminhan_deeplearning-symbolicai-activity-6883659145917165568-_taD).*
